006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
010import dev.doglog.DogLog;
011import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
012import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase;
013
014public abstract class Handoff extends SubsystemBase {
015    private static final Handoff instance;
016
017    private HandoffState state;
018
019    static {
020        if (Robot.isReal()) {
021            instance = new HandoffImpl();
022        } else {
023            instance = new HandoffSim();
024        }
025    }
026
027    public static Handoff getInstance() {
028        return instance;
029    }
030
031    protected Handoff() {
032        this.state = HandoffState.IDLE;
033    }
034
035    public void setState(HandoffState state) {
036        this.state = state;
037    }
038
039    public HandoffState getState() {
040        return this.state;
041    }
042
043    public enum HandoffState {
044        IDLE(Settings.Handoff.IDLE_VOLTAGE),
045        FORWARD(Settings.Handoff.FORWARD_VOLTAGE),
046        REVERSE(Settings.Handoff.REVERSE_VOLTAGE);
047
048        private Voltage targetVoltage;
049
050        private HandoffState(Voltage targetVoltage) {
051            this.targetVoltage = targetVoltage;
052        }
053
054        public Voltage getTargetVoltage() {
055            return targetVoltage;
056        }
057    }
058
059    protected abstract void stopMotors();
060    protected abstract boolean handoffStalling();
061
062    @Override
063    public void periodic() {
064        final HandoffState currentState = getState();
065        DogLog.log("Handoff/State", currentState.name());
066        DogLog.forceNt.log("States/Handoff", currentState.name());
067        DogLog.log("Handoff/Handoff Target Voltage", currentState.getTargetVoltage());
068        DogLog.forceNt.log("Handoff/Stalling", handoffStalling());
069    }
070}
